creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 231562
Patch (revision 1)

I want to add this patch mainly to add a SMB flavor to security/sssd. This eases installing a FreeBSD host to join Active Directory without using Ports.

I was trying to setup a FreeBSD client to a Windows Server 2022 Directory Controller and couldn't do it with an out-of-the-box pkg sssd.
